metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Arki low cleanup 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece and Ferryscanner support Patelia as the largest beach on Arki, about 500 m from the settlement/harbor, with pebbles outside, sand in the water, and normal depth. Encoded access, terrain, and depth only; no wind, safety, or live condition claim was encoded.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Arki low cleanup 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece supports Limnari as a small Arki beach reached on foot from the harbor/settlement, with sand and fine pebbles, rocky seabed at first, and shallow depth. Ferryscanner also lists Limnari as reachable on foot from the main town. No wind, safety, or live condition claim was encoded.
